canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>weave</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0c; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cx, cy;
let mouse = { x: 0, y: 0, active: false };
let lastMouse = { x: 0, y: 0 };
let mouseVel = { x: 0, y: 0 };

const nodes = [];
const strands = [];
const dewdrops = [];

let buildPhase = 0;
let buildTimer = 0;
let radialCount = 0;
let spiralAngle = 0;
let spiralRadius = 0;

const config = {
  radials: 24,
  spiralGap: 18,
  dampening: 0.96,
  stiffness: 0.08,
  mouseRadius: 120,
  mouseForce: 0.4
};

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cx = W / 2;
  cy = H / 2;
}

class Node {
  constructor(x, y, anchored = false) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.ox = x;
    this.oy = y;
    this.vx = 0;
    this.vy = 0;
    this.anchored = anchored;
  }
  
  update() {
    if (this.anchored) return;
    
    // Return force to original position
    const dx = this.ox - this.x;
    const dy = this.oy - this.y;
    this.vx += dx * config.stiffness;
    this.vy += dy * config.stiffness;
    
    // Mouse disturbance
    if (mouse.active) {
      const mx = this.x - mouse.x;
      const my = this.y - mouse.y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(mx * mx + my * my);
      if (dist < config.mouseRadius && dist > 0) {
        const force = (1 - dist / config.mouseRadius) * config.mouseForce;
        this.vx += mouseVel.x * force * 0.5;
        this.vy += mouseVel.y * force * 0.5;
        this.vx += mx / dist * force * 2;
        this.vy += my / dist * force * 2;
      }
    }
    
    this.vx *= config.dampening;
    this.vy *= config.dampening;
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
  }
}

class Strand {
  constructor(n1, n2, sticky = false) {
    this.n1 = n1;
    this.n2 = n2;
    this.sticky = sticky;
    this.age = 0;
    this.maxAge = 60;
  }
  
  update() {
    if (this.age < this.maxAge) this.age++;
  }
  
  draw() {
    const alpha = Math.min(1, this.age / this.maxAge);
    const dx = this.n2.x - this.n1.x;
    const dy = this.n2.y - this.n1.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    const tension = Math.min(1, dist / 200);
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(this.n1.x, this.n1.y);
    
    // Slight curve for organic feel
    const midX = (this.n1.x + this.n2.x) / 2;
    const midY = (this.n1.y + this.n2.y) / 2 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.002 + this.n1.x) * 2;
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(midX, midY, this.n2.x, this.n2.y);
    
    if (this.sticky) {
      // Spiral strands - stickier, more visible
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 200, ${alpha * 0.7 * (1 - tension * 0.3)})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 - tension * 0.5;
    } else {
      // Radial strands - structural
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(100, 220, 255, ${alpha * 0.6 * (1 - tension * 0.3)})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1 - tension * 0.3;
    }
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Glow effect
    if (tension > 0.3) {
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${alpha * tension * 0.3})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
}

class Dewdrop {
  constructor(strand) {
    this.strand = strand;
    this.t = Math.random();
    this.size = 2 + Math.random() * 3;
    this.shimmer = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
  }
  
  update() {
    this.shimmer += 0.05;
    // Gravity effect - drop slides down slightly
    const dy = this.strand.n2.y - this.strand.n1.y;
    if (dy > 0) {
      this.t = Math.min(0.95, this.t + 0.0003);
    }
  }
  
  draw() {
    const x = this.strand.n1.x + (this.strand.n2.x - this.strand.n1.x) * this.t;
    const y = this.strand.n1.y + (this.strand.n2.y - this.strand.n1.y) * this.t;
    
    // Movement from strand tension
    const offsetY = (this.strand.n1.vy + this.strand.n2.vy) * 0.5 * 2;
    
    const shimmerSize = this.size + Math.sin(this.shimmer) * 0.5;
    
    // Gradient for refraction effect
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(
      x - shimmerSize * 0.3, y - shimmerSize * 0.3 + offsetY, 0,
      x, y + offsetY, shimmerSize
    );
    grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)');
    grad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(150, 230, 255, 0.6)');
    grad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(200, 100, 220, 0.4)');
    grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.1)');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y + offsetY, shimmerSize, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
    ctx.fill();
  }
}

function createAnchorNodes() {
  // Create anchor points around the edge
  const margin = 50;
  const anchors = [];
  
  for (let i = 0; i < config.radials; i++) {
    const angle = (i / config.radials) * Math.PI * 2 - Math.PI / 2;
    const radius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.45;
    const x = cx + Math.cos(angle) * radius;
    const y = cy + Math.sin(angle) * radius;
    const node = new Node(x, y, true);
    nodes.push(node);
    anchors.push(node);
  }
  
  // Center node
  const center = new Node(cx, cy, false);
  nodes.push(center);
  
  return { anchors, center };
}

function buildRadial(anchors, center) {
  if (radialCount >= config.radials) {
    buildPhase = 1;
    spiralRadius = 30;
    return;
  }
  
  const anchor = anchors[radialCount];
  
  // Create nodes along radial
  const steps = 12;
  let prevNode = center;
  
  for (let i = 1; i <= steps; i++) {
    const t = i / steps;
    const x = cx + (anchor.x - cx) * t;
    const y = cy + (anchor.y - cy) * t;
    const node = new Node(x, y, i === steps);
    nodes.push(node);
    strands.push(new Strand(prevNode, node, false));
    prevNode = node;
  }
  
  radialCount++;
}

function buildSpiral() {
  const maxRadius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.42;
  
  if (spiralRadius > maxRadius) {
    buildPhase = 2;
    return;
  }
  
  // Find nodes at current radius on each radial
  const ringNodes = [];
  
  for (let i = 0; i < config.radials; i++) {
    const angle = (i / config.radials) * Math.PI * 2 - Math.PI / 2 + spiralAngle * 0.02;
    const x = cx + Math.cos(angle) * spiralRadius;
    const y = cy + Math.sin(angle) * spiralRadius;
    
    // Find or create node near this position
    let closest = null;
    let closestDist = Infinity;
    
    for (const node of nodes) {
      if (node.anchored) continue;
      const dx = node.x - x;
      const dy = node.y - y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      if (dist < closestDist && dist < 30) {
        closestDist = dist;
        closest = node;
      }
    }
    
    if (!closest) {
      closest = new Node(x, y, false);
      nodes.push(closest);
    }
    
    ringNodes.push(closest);
  }
  
  // Connect ring nodes
  for (let i = 0; i < ringNodes.length; i++) {
    const n1 = ringNodes[i];
    const n2 = ringNodes[(i + 1) % ringNodes.length];
    
    // Check if strand already exists
    const exists = strands.some(s => 
      (s.n1 === n1 && s.n2 === n2) || (s.n1 === n2 && s.n2 === n1)
    );
    
    if (!exists) {
      const strand = new Strand(n1, n2, true);
      strands.push(strand);
      
      // Add dewdrops to some sticky strands
      if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
        dewdrops.push(new Dewdrop(strand));
      }
    }
  }
  
  spiralRadius += config.spiralGap * (0.8 + Math.random() * 0.4);
  spiralAngle += 0.3;
}

function init() {
  resize();
  const { anchors, center } = createAnchorNodes();
  
  // Store for building
  window.webAnchors = anchors;
  window.webCenter = center;
}

function update() {
  buildTimer++;
  
  // Build the web over time
  if (buildPhase === 0 && buildTimer % 8 === 0) {
    buildRadial(window.webAnchors, window.webCenter);
  } else if (buildPhase === 1 && buildTimer % 6 === 0) {
    buildSpiral();
  }
  
  // Update all nodes
  for (const node of nodes) {
    node.update();
  }
  
  // Update strands
  for (const strand of strands) {
    strand.update();
  }
  
  // Update dewdrops
  for (const drop of dewdrops) {
    drop.update();
  }
  
  // Track mouse velocity
  mouseVel.x = mouse.x - lastMouse.x;
  mouseVel.y = mouse.y - lastMouse.y;
  lastMouse.x = mouse.x;
  lastMouse.y = mouse.y;
}

function draw() {
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 12, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw strands
  for (const strand of strands) {
    strand.draw();
  }
  
  // Draw dewdrops on top
  for (const drop of dewdrops) {
    drop.draw();
  }
  
  // Subtle center glow
  const centerGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, 100);
  centerGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(180, 100, 200, 0.1)');
  centerGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(180, 100, 200, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = centerGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(cx - 100, cy - 100, 200, 200);
}

function animate() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  mouse.active = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouse.active = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  // Click adds a strong disturbance - like a fly hitting the web
  const clickForce = 15;
  for (const node of nodes) {
    if (node.anchored) continue;
    const dx = node.x - e.clientX;
    const dy = node.y - e.clientY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    if (dist < 200 && dist > 0) {
      const force = (1 - dist / 200) * clickForce;
      node.vx += dx / dist * force;
      node.vy += dy / dist * force;
    }
  }
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX;
  mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY;
  mouse.active = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  mouse.active = false;
});

init();
animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
